subject: [PATCH v4 3/8] mm: list_lru: move list dead check to lock_list_lru_of_memcg()

reviews.author: Liam R. Howlett
reviews.summary: The patch was submitted without any technical concerns or suggestions from Liam.

2026-05-21.patch_summary: This patch moves the list dead check from the lock_list_lru() function to its caller, specifically in the lock_list_lru_of_memcg() function. This is done to prepare for unifying the lock_list_lru() variants and to only have the MEMCG variant perform a race check with cgroup deletion and list reparenting.
